step_by_step_reasoning: The architecture shows an automated clinical data curation pipeline. Verana uploads patient/provider/location data to S3. Amazon MWAA orchestrates the pipeline, pulling data into a Redshift staging table. A validation step runs checks on the schema, keys, and data types, sending Slack alerts to the Data Engineering team on failure. Upon successful validation, data is promoted to production Redshift tables. AWS Data Exchange then allows customers to subscribe and directly consume the datasets via Amazon Redshift Data Share.

graph.name: Verana Health Automated Clinical Data Curation Pipeline
graph.notes: Automated data validation and curation pipeline using MWAA, Redshift Serverless, and AWS Data Exchange for seamless customer data sharing.

nodes.name: Verana
nodes.notes: Internal team ingesting and uploading healthcare datasets.

nodes.name: Amazon S3 Bucket
nodes.notes: Stores raw and curated QData modules.

nodes.name: Amazon MWAA
nodes.notes: Airflow orchestrator managing the ingestion and validation pipeline steps.

nodes.name: Staging Table
nodes.notes: Temporary staging area in Redshift Serverless for incoming data.

nodes.name: Validation Table
nodes.notes: Performs schema, column data type, and primary/foreign key validation checks.

nodes.name: Production Table
nodes.notes: Stores curated, validated production data ready for sharing.

nodes.name: Amazon Redshift
nodes.notes: Serverless data warehouse running validations and hosting shared data.

nodes.name: AWS Data Exchange
nodes.notes: Single pane of glass for customer subscriptions and documentation updates.

nodes.name: Amazon Redshift Data Share
nodes.notes: Enables instant, copy-free sharing of Redshift tables to customers.

nodes.name: Customer
nodes.notes: Subscribes to and consumes data directly via their Redshift instance.

nodes.name: Slack
nodes.notes: Receives alert notifications if validation checks fail.

nodes.name: Data Engineering Team
nodes.notes: Triages pipeline alerts, fixes data issues, and restarts MWAA pipeline.

edges.notes: MWAA triggers data copy from S3.
MWAA copies data into Redshift Staging.
Validation table reads and validates staging data.
Promotes validated data to production table.
Slack alert triggered on validation failure.
Data engineer restarts the pipeline after fixing data.
Redshift data registered and cataloged on Data Exchange.
Data Exchange establishes Redshift Data Share.
